description: Turn any walk into rapid transit with the skechers Traffics shoe. Stylish to the T and with ample cushioning, its a perfect wear for those casual occasions.Upper Smooth leather upper with a polished look Lace-up system for snug Fit Layered stitched overlay detail on toe, sides and heel Leather overlay detailing on side stripe for breathability Lace up front for snug fit Padded collar and tongue for all day comfort Soft leather shoe lining and a textile lined leather tongue for snug fit Brand name on tongue Midsole Removable insole with suction points for air pressure Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole Flexible rubber traction outsole in ridged pattern for excellent grip on rough terrain Shoe careUse a dry brush to dust off the dirtUse a branded leather polish
